headline: Is Brown & Brown Stock Underperforming the Dow?
summary: Brown & Brown has notably underperformed the Dow over the past year, but analysts are cautiously optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Is Willis Towers Watson Stock Underperforming the Dow?
summary: While Willis Towers Watson has underperformed relative to the Dow over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a moderately optimistic outlook on the stock’s prospects.
